scope.decision_boundary_expectation_policy: exact workflow stage/action/posture/remediation assertions are enforced at both evaluate_claim_domain_decision and MCP decision boundaries for all eight semireal workflow scenarios
scope.structured_support_contract: eight fixture rows carry PII-safe workflow_support profiles projected into adapter payload evidence_checkpoint, finance_bridge, and legal_checkpoints surfaces; product code consumes these structured fields either at top level or nested under workflow_support without scenario-id branching

verification.required_acceptance_command: uv run --with pytest --with pydantic python -m pytest tests/integration/legal_ontology/test_domain_ontology_v1_pipeline.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_workflow_judgments_v1.py
verification.typecheck: uv run --with basedpyright --with pydantic basedpyright tests/integration/legal_ontology/test_domain_ontology_v1_pipeline.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_workflow_judgments_v1.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/workflow_scenario_requests.py tests/utils/workflow_scenario_expectations.py tests/utils/claim_domain_pipeline_support.py trustgraph_legal/domain_workflow_integration.py -> 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 notes
verification.compile: uv run --with pydantic python -m compileall tests/integration/legal_ontology/test_domain_ontology_v1_pipeline.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_workflow_judgments_v1.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/workflow_scenario_requests.py tests/utils/workflow_scenario_expectations.py tests/utils/claim_domain_pipeline_support.py trustgraph_legal/domain_workflow_integration.py -> pass
verification.local_python_note: system python3 is 3.9 and lacks typing.TypeAlias support for the test helper; uv was used as the accepted equivalent

manual_qa.summary: Reviewed all eight named semireal scenarios and confirmed each has scenario_id plus expected workflow stage, action, posture, remediation loop, and structured support signals. Direct public-boundary QA confirmed evaluate_claim_domain_decision and MCP decision outputs match each expected workflow stage/action/posture/remediation loop without raw payload leakage.
pii_and_payload_guardrails: no raw OCR or source text payload
no filing or court destination payload

risks: If all structured support is stripped, fallback deterministic defaults may route earlier to evidence completion, but the fallback remains advisory-only and review-safe. Exact outcomes now survive when support is preserved either as top-level evidence_checkpoint, finance_bridge, and legal_checkpoints fields or nested under workflow_support.
